data.name: Eye Contour Cream Supreme
data.description: A high-performance eye cream for mature skin that targets wrinkles, dark circles, puffiness, and visible lid sagging while restoring a firmer, more luminous look.

details.subtitle: Anti-aging eye cream for mature skin
details.overview: A carefully developed treatment created to rejuvenate and restore the eye area with focused care for fine lines, deep wrinkles, dark circles, under-eye puffiness, dryness, and loss of firmness.
mainBenefits: Helps reveal a more youthful-looking eye area in as little as two weeks.
Reduces the look of dark circles and softens crow's feet and fine lines.
Supports a livelier, firmer, and more lifted appearance with continued use.
additionalBenefits: Helps smooth the appearance of fine lines and deeper-set wrinkles.
Provides a visible lifting effect for slack or drooping eyelids.
Improves the look of firmness while reducing under-eye puffiness.
Boosts radiance around the eye contour for a brighter rested look.
Delivers up to 24 hours of moisture for comfort and softness.
Targets multiple visible signs of aging in the delicate eye area.
statistics: Consumer test on 110 women reported a visible transformation in the eye area after two weeks.
After four weeks, deep wrinkles around the eye contour appeared visibly reduced.
After eight weeks, puffiness looked visibly reduced and skin firmness appeared improved.
24-hour hydration claim based on an instrumental test with 27 volunteers.
usage: Apply in the morning after moisturizer and before sunscreen.
Apply at night as the final step of your routine.
Smooth gently across the full upper eyelid.
Tap beneath the eye and blend outward toward the hairline.
Contains vitamin A, so consider overall daily vitamin A use.
ingredientHighlights: Actin-Fiber Technology helps reinforce firmness and a more youthful eye contour.
Five-times concentrated Lempuyang extract supports wrinkle reduction and improved firmness versus previous formulas.
Citrus unshiu peel extract helps support clarity and radiance.
Iris extract is included for soothing care.
Skin-Empowering Illuminator helps promote a radiant finish.

data.name: Ultra Booster Exclusive Premium Effect Body Cream
data.description: A silky body cream that delivers immediate moisture, lasting comfort, and a firmer, more supple skin feel.

details.subtitle: 200 ml, with fragrance
details.overview: The exclusive body cream with the unique active ingredient complex Osmofill+ pampers dehydrated skin from the first application. Panthenol helps replenish moisture reserves over time to protect skin from drying out, while rich shea butter leaves the body feeling soft, supple, and carefully cared for.
mainBenefits: Firms the skin and helps improve elasticity.
Delivers an immediate moisture boost with a long-term care effect.
Leaves skin feeling soft, smooth, and supple.
additionalBenefits: Silky-soft texture creates a more luxurious body-care ritual.
Sensual fragrance adds a premium pampering finish.
Suitable for dehydrated skin needing richer daily comfort.
Free from silicones, parabens, PEGs, paraffins, and microplastics.
usage: Apply to clean, dry skin after bathing or showering.
Massage evenly into the body using circular motions.
Focus on areas prone to dryness or loss of firmness.
Use daily for ongoing softness and moisture support.
ingredientHighlights: Osmofill+ helps comfort dehydrated skin from the first application.
Panthenol supports long-lasting moisture and elasticity.
Shea butter helps nourish skin for a smooth, cared-for feel.

data.name: Ultra Booster
data.description: A multi-active premium effect serum that deeply hydrates, smooths wrinkles, and helps skin feel firmer with a silky finish.

details.subtitle: Multi-active Premium Effect Serum
details.overview: The multi-active Premium Effect Serum with the active ingredient complex Osmofill+ activates the longevity factors of the skin for a deeply effective anti-aging effect. Dry skin is pampered and tightened at the same time. The hyaluronic acid it contains intensively moisturizes and smoothes the skin, while a special encapsulation technology helps support a deep effect in the skin. Squalane optimizes the skin's own hydrolipid film and leaves the skin feeling silky soft, so wrinkles appear smoothed and contours look tighter.
mainBenefits: Intensively pads out the wrinkles.
Provides long-lasting moisture.
Protects against moisture loss.
additionalBenefits: Designed for dry skin needing premium anti-aging care.
Encapsulation technology supports a deep skin-care effect.
Leaves skin feeling silky soft and more supple.
Contours appear firmer and more refined with continued use.
Free from silicones, parabens, PEGs, paraffin, and microplastics.
usage: Apply to cleansed face, neck, and decollete.
Use before your moisturizer as part of your daily routine.
Massage in gently until fully absorbed.
Suitable for daily use, morning and evening.
ingredientHighlights: Osmofill+ helps support the skin's longevity factors for a premium anti-aging effect.
Hyaluronic acid intensely moisturizes and helps smooth the look of wrinkles.
Squalane supports the skin's hydrolipid film for a soft, silky finish.

data.name: PLATINUM RARE HAUTE-REJUVENATION PROTOCOL
data.description: A month-long freshly activated intensive face treatment powered by Exclusive Cellular Complex™, Platinum Multi-Peptide, and signaling molecules to support accelerated rejuvenation and restore even the most demanding skin.

details.subtitle: Month-long rejuvenating intensive face treatment
details.overview: La Prairie's most potent 30-day freshly activated intensive program is designed to reanimate skin for accelerated rejuvenation by activating renewal and redensifying the extracellular matrix. The silky, opulent two-phase formula absorbs seamlessly after activation, leaving skin radiant, smooth, and prepared for continued rejuvenation. Suitable for all skin types, including the most demanding.
mainBenefits: The appearance of wrinkles, dullness, uneven tone, and texture is visibly reduced.
Elasticity, density, and volume are effectively improved.
Skin tissues appear visibly rejuvenated and skin texture appears regenerated.
additionalBenefits: Helps protect skin against external stress factors.
Supports multi-faceted rejuvenation across different epidermic layers.
Designed to restore even demanding skin over a concentrated 30-day protocol.
Leaves skin looking revitalised, youthful, radiant, and smooth.
usage: For external use only.
Avoid the eye area and rinse thoroughly with water in case of direct eye contact.
Use only on healthy skin.
Do not use immediately after shaving, depilation, waxing, or on injured skin.
In case of allergic reaction, discontinue use immediately and contact a dermatologist.
Keep out of reach of children and do not use on children.
ingredientHighlights: Exclusive Cellular Complex™ helps protect skin cells from external stressors and energises natural repair and renewal processes.
Platinum Multi-Peptide is engineered to activate multi-faceted skin rejuvenation across different epidermic layers.
Signaling molecules support natural renewal processes and cellular communication for a more revitalised look.
statistics: Complimentary shipping.
3-Day Trial Set with each order.

details.overview: La Prairie's first Cashmere Body Cream envelops skin in ultimate comfort. Formulated with a biomimetic peptide inspired by cashmere, an advanced hydrating complex, and Exclusive Cellular Complex™, it goes beyond hydration to restore suppleness and reveal the luxurious sensation of cashmere on skin. A rich texture melts into a balm-like veil with a smooth, supple, deeply nourishing finish, while a refined fragrance unfolds with velvety musk and delicate floral nuances.

data.description: A body massage oil created for a holistic, deeply relaxing massage ritual with a luminous, toning, revitalising jasmine scent and a velvety, nourishing finish.

details.subtitle: Massageol fur den Korper
details.overview: The CHANEL body oils were created for a holistic and deeply relaxing art of massage. L'HUILE JASMIN is a radiant, toning, revitalising oil in which jasmine blossoms unfold a soft floral, sensual, sunlit aroma over a delicate woody musk base. The scent evokes summer fields in Grasse, while the oil leaves skin velvety, nourished, hydrated, and subtly perfumed.
mainBenefits: Leaves the skin velvety, perfectly hydrated, and delicately scented.
Creates a deeply relaxing full-body massage ritual.
Delivers a revitalising sensation with warmth, nourishment, and comfort.
additionalBenefits: Suitable for the whole body after bathing or showering.
Can also be used as a hair treatment before shampooing on lengths and ends.
Dermatologically tested.
usage: Massage into the whole body with circular movements after bathing or showering.
For hair care, apply to lengths and ends before shampooing.
ingredientHighlights: Contains jasmine from Grasse, a signature raw material of the Maison.
Enriched with sunflower flower oil selected for its purity and biocompatibility with the skin.
The sunflower is cultivated with respect for biological cycles.

data.name: SUBLIMAGE LA CREME CORPS ET DECOLLETE
data.description: An ultimate body cream for the body and decollete that helps regenerate, soothe instantly, and restore radiance with Vanilla Planifolia and light-reflecting micropearls.

details.subtitle: Ultimative Korpercreme: regeneriert und schenkt Leuchtkraft
details.overview: This exceptional care extends the regenerating power of the SUBLIMAGE line to the body and decollete. Enriched with Vanilla Planifolia, the signature ingredient of the range, SUBLIMAGE La Creme Corps et Decollete offers a regenerating and instantly soothing effect. Its creamy texture melts into the skin with a velvety finish, while light-reflecting micropearls leave the body and decollete glowing.
mainBenefits: Helps the skin regain suppleness, firmness, softness, and radiance.
Hydrates and regenerates the decollete, an area especially prone to visible signs of aging.
Wraps the whole body in comfort while leaving a gentle shimmer.
additionalBenefits: Protects against negative external influences and oxidative stress.
Designed for morning and evening use on perfectly cleansed, dry skin.
Can be paired with activating massage gestures on areas lacking firmness.
usage: Apply morning and evening to perfectly cleansed and dried skin.
To optimize results, pinch areas lacking firmness between thumb and forefinger with activating motions.
Warm a small amount between the hands and spread over the chest, decollete, and neck.
ingredientHighlights: Concentrated Vanilla Planifolia botanical water provides antioxidant action.
Vanilla Planifolia enfleurage oil offers delicate nurturing care.
Light-reflecting micropearls help enhance visible radiance.

data.name: DAS ANTI-AGING-DUO
data.description: A limited-edition CHANEL skincare gift set pairing LE LIFT Creme and LE LIFT La Creme Main in a star-inspired cosmetic pouch for smoother facial skin and perfectly cared-for hands.

details.subtitle: LE LIFT Creme und LE LIFT La Creme Main
details.overview: Step into the CHANEL universe with a festive limited-edition gift set featuring LE LIFT Creme and LE LIFT La Creme Main in a cosmetic pouch inspired by the starry night sky. Woven with glossy midnight blue and black threads and finished with gold details including a camellia-shaped zipper, it pairs smoothing face care with hand care designed to preserve a youthful look.
mainBenefits: Smooths the appearance of facial skin while caring intensively for the hands.
Pairs botanical alfalfa concentrate with a skin-friendly formula designed for visible anti-aging care.
Helps hands look smoother and more even while nourishing them deeply.
additionalBenefits: LE LIFT Creme contains 91% ingredients of natural origin.
LE LIFT La Creme Main contains 90% ingredients of natural origin and is suitable for all skin types, including sensitive skin.
The hand cream absorbs quickly, leaves a velvety finish, and fits easily into a handbag thanks to its pebble-like design.
statistics: LE LIFT Creme: wrinkles were smoothed by 25% in an instrumental assessment of 31 women after 8 weeks of use.
LE LIFT La Creme Main: hands appeared smoother by 30% and plumper by 22% in an instrumental assessment of 11 women.
LE LIFT La Creme Main: up to 8 hours of hydration in a clinical evaluation of 20 women after 8 weeks.
LE LIFT La Creme Main: pigment spots reduced by 12% and skin appeared more even by 18% in clinical evaluations after 8 weeks.
usage: Apply LE LIFT Creme and follow with lifting massage strokes from the neck upward across the face as described in the LE GESTE LIFT technique.
Use LE LIFT La Creme Main as often as desired.
For a firming effect, work the backs of the hands with gentle pinching movements.
ingredientHighlights: Botanical alfalfa concentrate is described as as effective as retinol while remaining gentle on the skin.
Licorice extract helps brighten and support a more even skin tone on the hands.
Mimosa, jojoba, and sunflower waxes help nourish the hands intensely.

data.name: N°1 DE CHANEL REVITALISIERENDES SERUM-DUO MIT ROTER KAMELIE
data.description: A revitalising serum duo with red camellia that helps refresh, smooth, and preserve a youthful-looking complexion and eye area with a two-step ritual for face and eyes.

details.subtitle: Erfrischt - glattet - bewahrt ein jugendliches Hautbild
details.overview: The N°1 DE CHANEL line preserves the youthful freshness of the skin by harnessing the power of the exceptionally long-living red camellia. This duo pairs a 15 ml eye serum and a 30 ml face serum in a red cosmetic pouch. Together, they form a two-step ritual designed to refresh the eye area and smooth the complexion while supporting youthful-looking skin vitality.
mainBenefits: The eye serum with its patented cryoapplicator helps reduce signs of fatigue by 35% immediately and leaves the eye area smoother.
The face serum helps the skin look more radiant and smoother, and wrinkles appear immediately softened.
The duo supports youthful-looking features of the skin and is suitable for all skin types, including sensitive skin.
additionalBenefits: After 8 weeks of use, the serum's efficacy is said to be tripled in clinical evaluation.
Red camellia extract stimulates skin vitality mechanisms and helps protect against oxidative stress.
An oligopeptide helps stimulate markers of youthful-looking skin.
statistics: 35% reduction in visible signs of fatigue immediately after using the eye serum, based on self-assessment by 44 women.
Clinical evaluation of 43 women showed stronger serum efficacy after 8 weeks compared with the immediate effect.
Red camellia extract stimulated skin vitality mechanisms by 63% in an in-vitro enzyme activity test on reconstructed skin.
usage: First open the eye area using the rotating cooling applicator.
Then apply the serum to smooth the skin, protect against oxidative stress, and boost radiance.
Finish the ritual with the N°1 DE CHANEL cream to help plump and strengthen skin throughout the day.
ingredientHighlights: Red camellia extract is obtained through a three-step extraction process including cold grinding, hydrofusion, and clarification.
The extract is rich in protocatechuic acid and helps support youthful-looking skin.
An oligopeptide helps stimulate markers associated with youthful skin vitality.

data.name: SUBLIMAGE LA CREME YEUX
data.description: An ultimate eye cream enriched with Vanilla Planifolia that smooths, brightens, and helps transform the eye contour with a comprehensive regenerating effect.

details.subtitle: Ultimative Augenpflege
details.overview: SUBLIMAGE La Creme Yeux is an exceptional eye treatment enriched with Vanilla Planifolia. Its enveloping texture smooths the delicate eye contour and restores radiance, helping the eye area appear more awake, rested, and transformed. The formula acts on the parameters defined by CHANEL research for youthful-looking skin, including hydration, feel, wrinkles, structure, evenness, strength, and radiance.
mainBenefits: Smooths and brightens the delicate eye contour.
Helps the eye area appear awake, rested, and radiant.
Acts on multiple dimensions of youthful-looking skin including hydration, wrinkles, structure, evenness, strength, and radiance.
additionalBenefits: Polyfractioned Vanilla Planifolia contains a 40-times higher concentration of active molecules than the raw plant material.
The key active is said to triple cell regeneration in an ex-vivo test.
Presented in a refillable polished glass jar with an insert-style refill.
usage: Apply morning and evening using an amount about the size of a grain of rice around the eye contour.
Use lifting strokes on the upper lid from the inner to outer corner, first with the index finger and then the middle finger.
Use smoothing strokes on crow's feet toward the temples.
Use long, gentle alternating strokes under the eye to target dark shadows.
ingredientHighlights: Polyfractioned Vanilla Planifolia is cultivated and harvested in the CHANEL open-sky laboratory in Madagascar.
Planifolia-Ephemeres help reinforce the action of polyfractioned Vanilla Planifolia and support the regenerative power of the eye contour.
The Sublime Eye Complex boosts microcirculation and helps visibly reduce puffiness and dark shadows.

data.name: 31 LE ROUGE - RECHARGE
data.description: A satin lipstick refill inspired by the spirit of 31 rue Cambon, combining intense long-wearing color with a caring formula and a refill design made for the faceted 31 LE ROUGE glass case.

details.subtitle: Satinierter Lippenstift
details.overview: 31 LE ROUGE captures the spirit of 31 rue Cambon in one of CHANEL's most irresistible lip creations. The refill is designed for the square, faceted 31 LE ROUGE case inspired by the mirrors of Gabrielle Chanel's legendary Art Deco staircase. Available in 12 satin shades, the formula combines intense, long-lasting color with a sensorial glide and ongoing lip care.
mainBenefits: Delivers intense, luminous, long-lasting satin color.
Combines easy application with a caring formula for lips that look more beautiful day after day.
Helps lips appear smoother with more defined contours.
additionalBenefits: Formulated with 75% ingredients of natural origin.
Transparent pearl powder and finely micronized pigments help reveal pure, radiant color intensity.
The refill can be fully closed and swapped between 12 satin shades, but only fits the 31 LE ROUGE case.
statistics: After 4 weeks, lips were better hydrated by 70% in an instrumental test on 20 women.
After 4 weeks, lips appeared smoother by 44%, firmer by 55%, and more contoured by 14% in clinical evaluation on 26 women.
usage: Insert the refill into the lower part of the square, faceted 31 LE ROUGE case until the magnetic click is heard.
After inserting the refill, apply color first to the center of the lips by drawing an X from upper to lower lip.
Then spread the color outward toward the corners of the mouth.
Keep the product in its quilted black pouch to help protect the faceted glass case from scratches.
ingredientHighlights: Maracuja oil helps support comfort and glide.
Gardenia oil from Gaujacq is an exclusive CHANEL ingredient that helps smooth lips and define contours.
Transparent pearl powder enhances the purity and radiance of the color.

data.name: LES BEIGES BELLE MINE NATURELLE SOMMER ESSENTIALS SET
data.description: A limited-edition LES BEIGES summer essentials set that brings together CHANEL complexion and makeup must-haves for a naturally radiant glow, presented in an elegant basket for on-the-go use.

details.subtitle: LES BEIGES Exklusivkreation
details.overview: The LES BEIGES BELLE MINE NATURELLE SOMMER ESSENTIALS SET brings together LES BEIGES must-haves for a naturally radiant complexion and a fresh glow as if after a day by the sea. Presented in an elegant basket, this limited edition set offers a simple multi-step ritual including a universal illuminating powder, a fluid blush, a mascara for volume and definition, and a ROUGE COCO FLASH lipstick.
mainBenefits: Creates a fresh, naturally radiant complexion with simple multi-step application.
Combines complexion, eye, and lip essentials in one refined travel-ready set.
Delivers glow, color, definition, and glossy comfort in a single limited edition ritual.
additionalBenefits: LES BEIGES Poudre Illuminatrice gives the face a soft veil of summer radiance.
LES BEIGES Blush Belle Mine provides a fresh, hydrated, second-skin effect with a sun-kissed tint.
LES BEIGES Mascara offers long-wearing volume and definition without clumping.
statistics: ROUGE COCO FLASH Hydraboost Complex provides up to 8 hours of hydration in an instrumental assessment of 15 women.
ROUGE COCO FLASH delivered 45% longer-lasting comfort in self-assessment by 22 women four hours after application.
usage: Apply the illuminating powder to cheekbones, above the brows, and along the bridge of the nose for either subtle or more striking radiance.
Apply the blush with fingers or brush, blending outward and using any remaining product on the bridge of the nose for freshness.
Apply mascara from the upper lash line to the tips with a slight twist, and use the tip for inner-corner and lower lashes.
Apply ROUGE COCO FLASH freely for a glossy lip look in a single stroke.
ingredientHighlights: The illuminating powder is made with fine pearlescent particles for soft glow.
The mascara contains the Pro-Vitamine Protecteur signature complex, camellia ceramides, and peptide-enriched yeast extract.
ROUGE COCO FLASH contains a Hydraboost Complex with three waxes of natural origin plus oils that intensively reflect light.

data.name: ROUGE ALLURE VELVET
data.description: A limited-edition set of two matte lipsticks with high color intensity in new shades 478 RENCONTRE and 479 CRUSH, presented in a gold-toned travel case with an inner mirror.

details.subtitle: Limitierte Edition - Set aus 2 mattierenden Lippenstiften mit hoher Farbintensitat
details.overview: This limited-edition ROUGE ALLURE VELVET set includes two new matte shades with high color intensity: 478 RENCONTRE, a powdery pink, and 479 CRUSH, a brown-rosewood tone. Presented in a gold-toned case for travel with a built-in mirror, the set is inspired by the iconic COCO CRUSH ring and the quilted motif engraved at the base of ROUGE ALLURE VELVET.
mainBenefits: Delivers long-lasting matte color with high intensity.
The second-skin texture offers high comfort while defining the lips.
Jojoba oil derivative and shea butter provide immediate moisture and a supple feel.
additionalBenefits: Soft-focus microspheres and ultrafine pearlescent particles create a luminous matte finish.
Fine, highly concentrated pigments support an even and lasting makeup result.
The mirrored travel case makes touch-ups easy throughout the day.
usage: Apply directly to the lips from the center outward.
For an ultra-precise lip contour, draw a line first with LE CRAYON LEVRES.
Then apply the lipstick with the lip brush from the liner.
ingredientHighlights: Jojoba oil derivative helps support moisture and smoothness.
Shea butter helps create immediate comfort and softness.
Soft-focus microspheres and pearlescent particles help balance matte finish with radiance.

data.name: SUBLIMAGE L'ESSENCE DE TEINT
data.description: A serum foundation for ultimate radiance that combines the benefits of Vanilla Planifolia with light-reflecting pigments for a smooth, luminous, hydrated complexion.

details.subtitle: Serum-Foundation fur ultimative Leuchtkraft
details.overview: This first tinted serum from CHANEL combines the benefits of Vanilla Planifolia with the power of a radiance booster. Its unique formula blends pigments with light-reflecting particles to instantly activate glow that lasts all day. The serum texture is both enveloping and lightweight, melting onto the skin to smooth its appearance and enhance natural radiance, while the dedicated brush allows tailored application and buildable coverage.
mainBenefits: Delivers an even, silky-matte, radiant complexion that lasts all day.
Helps the skin look immediately smoother, more luminous, and more plumped.
Hydrates the skin and helps protect it from external environmental stressors.
additionalBenefits: Complexion appeared 86% more even immediately after application and 70% more even after 12 hours in clinical evaluation.
Radiance increased by 53% immediately and 39% after 12 hours in clinical evaluation.
Hydration increased by 94% after 30 minutes and 63% after 12 hours in instrumental evaluation.
statistics: Plumping effect improved by 28% immediately after application in clinical evaluation on 21 participants.
Smoothing effect improved by 27% immediately after application in clinical evaluation on 21 participants.
usage: Dispense a small amount of foundation onto the back of the hand.
Pick up a hazelnut-sized amount with the tip of the brush.
Tap onto cheeks, forehead, chin, and neck, then smooth from the center outward.
Blend evenly with circular motions and repeat application as desired for more coverage.
ingredientHighlights: Concentrated Vanilla Planifolia botanical water helps preserve the skin's natural beauty and protect against environmental stress thanks to antioxidant properties.
Vanilla enfleurage oil, used here for the first time in a CHANEL makeup formula, wraps the skin in comfort and softness.
Coated pigments combined with film-forming polymers help optimize wear.
